curation.synopsis: Gryphonne IV, one of the mightiest forge worlds of the Adeptus Mechanicus, has been devoured by Hive Fleet Leviathan. Its surviving tech-priests are left adrift, stripped of purpose and home. Explorator Talin Sherax refuses to accept oblivion. When word reaches her of a legendary relic from humanity's most distant past — one that might restore all that was lost — she assembles a crew and sets out on a desperate journey across a war-torn galaxy. But the quest demands ever-greater sacrifices, drawing Sherax closer to the edge of outright heresy. Ancient dangers, rival powers, and the scars of loss stand between her and salvation — if salvation is even what she will find at the end of the road.

flags.reason: Reviews mention Orks, Aeldari and Necrons as xenos encountered en route, but name no specific dynasty or warband as a sustained antagonist; only Hive Fleet Leviathan is confirmed.
